name: 全球网络
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 交通与通信 / Transport & Communication / Transport & Communication
curriculum_points: Students will be able to identify examples of global networks (e.g., trade, communication, transportation) and describe how they connect people and countries. (Age 7-9)
Students will be able to investigate a global issue (e.g., supply chains, news dissemination) to understand the complexity and interdependence of worldwide systems. (Age 9-11)

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 探究式学习动画：问题→假设→实验→结论流程可视化
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 探究学习过程可视化
